summary: This role is a poor fit because the required thinking style—demanding fast-paced analytical reasoning and strong functional math—directly conflicts with your core cognitive struggles. Furthermore, the mandatory night shifts and high on-call requirements for newer staff undermine your priority for predictable hours and a sustainable work-life balance. Given the high-stakes stress of managing life-critical infrastructure and the physical demands of the role, this position presents an unsustainable risk to your long-term wellbeing.
